rows.desc: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.
SpaceXAI's coding agent harness and TUI. Fullscreen, mouse interactive, extensible.

Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
Management console for the Null ecosystem — install, configure, and monitor AI agents, orchestration workflows, task pipelines, and system health
A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data
Skills for Design Engineers.
Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents

Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
免费无广告的追剧资源指南，人工精选资源、每天检测资源有效性。收录在线影视、影视APP、网盘搜索、磁力BT、字幕、TVBox / 影视仓空壳软件/配置地址、IPTV直播源、会员拼团、影视相关开源项目。开源，社区共同维护。
Codex Dream Skin
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
Skills for Design Engineers
Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.
Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy   on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.
The job search that runs on your machine. AI job application framework built on Claude Code: evaluate postings, tailor CVs, write cover letters, prep interviews. Fork it and own it.
Coding Agent Harness
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
A skill that turn any brand into a scrollable 3D world
1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
Use LLMs to hide messages inside normal looking conversations

Generate production-quality SVG+PNG technical diagrams from natural language. 7 styles, UML support, and AI/Agent workflow patterns.
User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
Orchestrate multiple coding agents from desktop and mobile
Your clothes, extracted and organized with gpt-image.

Linux kernel source tree

Turn your coding agent into a video studio: describe a video in plain language, and your agent writes the timeline and produces the file.
Codex plugin that turns attached object images into code-only, animation-ready procedural Three.js models.

Universal SEO skill for Claude Code. 25 sub-skills + 18 sub-agents covering technical SEO, E-E-A-T, schema, GEO/AEO, backlinks, local SEO, maps intelligence, semantic clustering, e-commerce SEO, international SEO, Google APIs, and PDF/Excel reporting. Optional DataForSEO, Firecrawl, and Banana extensions.
PlayStation 5 emulator for Windows
Evidence-based learning engine for Claude Code — first-principles curricula, free-recall verification with receipts, FSRS-scheduled memory, and explorable artifacts. Learn anything; keep it.

OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.
The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
Design clear, theme-specific GitHub README homepages with SVG titles, real proof, and maintainable Markdown

A visualization tool that replays coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase.

Attributed, resolvable artifact references for agent handoffs — a ~30-byte token instead of pasted context. MCP-native; the reference layer for the agent-harness world.
A new open-source format for interactive video on the web, with a built-in state machine, frame-accurate transitions, and packed-alpha transparency.
The Fable Workflow: how Claude Fable 5 worked, distilled into skills any model can run, with the eval that keeps it honest. Think / act / prove.
A Codex skill that finds evidence-backed potential first customers from recent public signals.
Master the hide-and-seek battlefield with advanced ESP, aimbot, and movement utilities. Dominate every match with precision and style.
